classes.name: emmet.api.routes.molecules.molecules.query_operators.FormulaQuery
documentation:
Factory method to generate a dependency for querying by
    formula.

NOTE: wildcards are not currently supported. It's unclear, at present,
if wildcards are really necessary or useful for molecular queries. Even
if they are used, they might be different than the wildcards used on the
materials side. For instance, one might desire wildcard numbers, rather than
wildcard elements, e.g. "C1 Li* O3"

classes.name: emmet.api.routes.molecules.molecules.query_operators.CalcMethodQuery
documentation:
Method to generate a query based on level of theory and solvent.

This query differs from ExactCalcMethodQuery in that CalcMethodQuery will check
that the desired level of theory and/or solvent was used for some calculations
(they are included in the sets of unique levels of theory, solvents, or lot-solvent
combinations), whereas ExactCalcMethodQuery will check that the desired level of theory
and/or solvent were used to generate the specific document being queried.

classes.name: emmet.api.routes.molecules.molecules.query_operators.ExactCalcMethodQuery
documentation:
Method to generate a query based on level of theory and solvent

This query differs from CalcMethodQuery in that CalcMethodQuery will check
that the desired level of theory and/or solvent was used for some calculations
(they are included in the sets of unique levels of theory, solvents, or lot-solvent
combinations), whereas ExactCalcMethodQuery will check that the desired level of theory
and/or solvent were used to generate the specific document being queried.

classes.name: emmet.api.routes.molecules.molecules.query_operators.HashQuery
documentation: Method to generate a query based on the augmented graph hashes of the molecule

geometry optimization step.

Args:

        of a task document.

modules.name: emmet.api.routes.materials.synthesis.data_adaptor
documentation:
This script converts synthesis recipes data fetched directly
from the public repo of synthesis recipes
(https://github.com/CederGroupHub/text-mined-synthesis_public)
into MP compatible formats.

functions.name: emmet.api.routes.materials.synthesis.data_adaptor.string2comp
documentation: Convert string material formulas into pymatgen Compositions.

functions.name: emmet.api.routes.materials.synthesis.data_adaptor.convert_recipe
documentation: Convert an entire synthesis recipe.

functions.name: emmet.api.routes.materials.synthesis.data_adaptor.convert_json_public_repo
documentation:
Convert the public synthesis recipes dataset (in a json file)
into a format as json file which can be imported into the MP database.

modules.name: emmet.api.routes.materials.synthesis.data_adaptor_synpro
documentation:
This script converts synthesis recipes data fetched directly
from Ceder Group Synthesis Mining team MongoDB into MP compatible
formats.

functions.name: emmet.api.routes.materials.synthesis.data_adaptor_synpro.convert_value
documentation: Convert values in operation conditions dictionaries.

documentation: Convert values specified in materials elements_vars.

functions.name: emmet.api.routes.materials.synthesis.data_adaptor_synpro.convert_material
documentation: Convert materials dictionaries.

functions.name: emmet.api.routes.materials.synthesis.data_adaptor_synpro.get_material_formula
documentation: Convert string material formulas into pymatgen Compositions.

functions.name: emmet.api.routes.materials.synthesis.data_adaptor_synpro.target_comps
documentation: Find all target material formulas and convert them into Composition.

functions.name: emmet.api.routes.materials.synthesis.data_adaptor_synpro.precursor_comps
documentation: Find all precursor material formulas and convert them into Composition.

functions.name: emmet.api.routes.materials.synthesis.data_adaptor_synpro.convert_one
documentation: Convert an entire synthesis recipe.

functions.name: emmet.api.routes.materials.synthesis.data_adaptor_synpro.main
documentation:
Convert the Reactions_Solid_State/Reactions_Sol_Gel collection in
Ceder Group database into a json file which can be imported into the MP database.

These will be ingested via Drones, built by Builders, and served via the API
